recommended.author: Vivian Udemba
recommended.description:
On her eighteenth birthday, Aurelia thought she was finally getting her fairytale.

The hottest, most desired boy in school had asked her to be his girlfriend. After weeks of persuasion—from him and even her best friend—she decided to give him the one thing she had been saving...her virginity.

recommended.description:
Elena Moretti sees a murder in a dark alley.
 
The victim? Her brother who she thought was dead for three years.
The killer? Luca De Santis, The Blood King, the most feared mafia boss in the city.

recommended.title: Fate Bound Us Twice: The Bride He Once Rejected
recommended.author: YemzWrites
recommended.description:
Lucia Romano vanished thirteen years ago. Kidnapped as a child, she disappeared before the marriage contract binding her to Alessandro De Luca could ever become real.

recommended.title: VOWS OF VENGEANCE: HER RUTHLESS CONTRACT WIFE
recommended.author: blessing amos
recommended.description:
Diana Moreau has spent her life surviving.
Crushing debt, loan sharks at her door, and a son slowly dying in a hospital bed have stripped away all her pride.
So when a dangerous stranger offers her a one year contract, ten thousand a week, Diana signs.
Alessia Vincenzo is cold. Untouchable. Lethal.

recommended.title: THE 7 TIME REJECTED OMEGA
recommended.author: adeyinka damilola
recommended.description:
All her life, Ilyana has been rejected—seven times by seven mates who looked her in the eye, called her worthless, and cast her aside like she meant nothing.

recommended.description:
I signed a ten thousand dollar contract to fake-marry billionaire Alpha Adrian Kane for one year. No touching. No feelings. No questions.

They called me wolfless. Broken. Abandoned by the Goddess herself.

“Now honey, what was that about earlier?” Mom demands after a beat, her voice even. Controlled. Measured. Like she's always been.

I look at her. At her copperry red hair much like my own, conflicted. And my eyes water.

recommended.author: Abuya Joy

The Alpha who saved Seraphina from rogues never meant to keep her, until she turned twenty one and the Moon Goddess marked her as his.

recommended.title: The Last Halfblood
recommended.author: Bella Silva
recommended.description:
In the Werewolf Republic of Eron, Lyrianne Swanson is marked for death. 

She’s a halfblood.

recommended.title: ​After Abandoning My Family, I Became Their True Love?​
recommended.author: Jennifer Lawrence
recommended.description:
After years of marriage, my husband and son see me as a disgrace.
Time and again, they abandon me to care for another woman, and this time, I finally wake up.
They are not worth my love！
But when I officially ask for a divorce, they suddenly claim that I am the one they truly love.
What is going on?

recommended.title: The Stand-In Heiress Stops Pretending
recommended.author: Lira Voss
recommended.description:
I gave Ethan three years. He told his friends I was just a substitute for the woman he really loved. I cooked for him with a fever. I called him twenty-three times from the ER — he blocked every one because he was with her.

So I left my key on the counter and walked out.

recommended.author: Willow Ashford
recommended.description:
“Say my name, Cecilia.” Felix commanded.

“Please... Felix, please...” Cecilia sobbed. She held onto his powerful frame, completely consumed by him.

He gripped her chin, forcing her to see the raw desire in his eyes.

recommended.title: Dear Father, Your Mistress Is Mine
recommended.author: HerMajesty Writes
recommended.description:
Yasmin Vaziri woke up in a hospital three years ago with no memory of who she was. Her only family, her aunt, told her to focus building a new life. So when a charming billionaire sweeps her off her feet at a party in Ibiza, she thinks her aunt's wish is finally coming true.
